mission: Merge external onboarding, supplier capability, standards hygiene, release-control seams, and runbook dependencies into one reviewable watchlist.

assumptions.decision: Simulator or manual fallback posture counts as watch or replaceable-by-simulator, never as the dependency being fully healthy.
Resolved architecture gaps remain in the register as retired or guarded rows so later gate tasks can prove they were deliberately closed rather than forgotten.

Standards, release-publication, evidence-graph, HSM, alert-routing, and restore-rehearsal seams are added as internal dependency watch rows because the prompt requires one merged watch posture, not only external inventory rows.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: incident escalation, watch tuple response, and continuity recovery
monitoring_signals: Alert routes still use placeholder destination identifiers
role-to-rotation mapping is not yet tenant- or service-owner bound
dependencies.degradation_mode: incident_response_relies_on_manual_broadcast
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Use controlled manual escalation lists and freeze optimistic alert-coverage claims.
dependencies.notes: Inherited open gap from seq_015 and seq_016.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: all release, conformance, retention, and BAU evidence admissibility
monitoring_signals: AssuranceGraphCompletenessVerdict remains admissible for the current candidate
Evidence export rows still point to the same graph hash
dependencies.degradation_mode: approval_and_archive_actions_fail_closed
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Stop signoff and archive operations until the graph is regenerated and complete.

dependencies.dependency_name: Cross-organisation secure messaging rail including MESH
source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6D. Referral pack composer, dispatch adapters, and transport contract
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: cross-organisation messaging and hub coordination
monitoring_signals: Current delivery evidence or other allowed proof class accepted by the live transport assurance profile for the exact outbound effect chain.
Transport accepted or checksum acknowledged
Mailbox queued or message handed off
Cross-organisation access approval before live mailbox use
dependencies.degradation_mode: Delivery evidence still pending or disputed; Transport-only evidence without current-generation acknowledgement
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Retry through the same idempotent effect chain; Monitored mailbox or telephone escalation where policy allows
dependencies.notes: The rail may carry practice visibility or pharmacy payloads, but transport acceptance alone never settles either business truth.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: notification, secure-link, and patient reassurance posture
monitoring_signals: Current MessageDeliveryEvidenceBundle or AdapterReceiptCheckpoint for the live CommunicationEnvelope and route tuple.
Provider accepted the send
SMTP or API returned queued state
Sender-domain verification and security review
dependencies.degradation_mode: Delivery failed, disputed, expired, or suppressed; Message thread closed locally while delivery truth is still unresolved
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Controlled resend under the same authoritative chain; Support repair or callback escalation
dependencies.notes: Transport accepted is never equal to delivered; patient or staff calmness must wait for current delivery evidence or explicit fallback.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: booking, waitlist, and provider confirmation truth
monitoring_signals: Current supplier binding and authoritative read or outcome observation path accepted for the same supplier, organisation, action scope, and transport assurance profile.
Supplier name matches a supported family
Static docs suggest support without current binding proof
Supplier sandbox and capability evidence review
dependencies.degradation_mode: linkage_required or local_component_required capability states; Supplier-specific action support withdrawn or stale
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Assisted-only handling or hub fallback; Simulator and contract-test path while supplier access remains incomplete
dependencies.notes: This row captures live supplier paths; the separate IM1 pairing row captures the programme gates that must exist before these paths are usable.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: release signing, provenance, and emergency exception control
monitoring_signals: HSM-backed signing key not yet bound to the chosen supply-chain path
release evidence still references placeholder signing material
dependencies.degradation_mode: promotion_blocked_for_live_release
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Keep non-production verification only and block live promotion until HSM provisioning is complete.
dependencies.notes: Inherited open gap from seq_015 and seq_016.

dependencies.dependency_name: IM1 Pairing programme and prerequisite path
source_refs: phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4B Provider capability matrix and adapter seam
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: booking, waitlist, and provider confirmation truth
monitoring_signals: Current pairing evidence pack showing the exact supplier, organisation, and environment have cleared the required IM1 stage for the targeted capability set.
Prerequisite forms submitted
Supplier conversation started
Commercial and assurance approval before live supplier access
dependencies.degradation_mode: SCAL or model-interface prerequisites still pending; Supported-test or assurance incomplete for the selected supplier path
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Stay on simulator or supported-test path only; Keep the related route in assisted-only, recovery-only, or blocked posture
dependencies.notes: IM1 remains baseline for local booking reach, but the corpus is explicit that it stays out of the Phase 2 identity critical path.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: booking, waitlist, and provider confirmation truth
monitoring_signals: BookingConfirmationTruthProjection(confirmationTruthState = confirmed) backed by a durable provider reference or same-commit read-after-write proof for the same BookingTransaction.
Slot list rendered from a frozen snapshot
Local click acknowledgement
Supplier-selection scorecard and simulation evidence before live booking exposure
dependencies.degradation_mode: confirmation_pending posture after async acceptance; supplier_reconciliation_pending due to disputed or stale supplier truth
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Stay in confirmation_pending with explicit truth posture; Route to waitlist, callback, or hub fallback under current policy
dependencies.notes: No supplier queue acceptance, webhook arrival, or worker dequeue may be projected as booked truth.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: partner-facing capability and current-baseline delivery
monitoring_signals: Current artifact quarantine outcome showing the capture bundle or recording is safe, readable enough, or explicitly quarantined with governed next action.
Object stored successfully
Scan job started
Security review of scanner placement and quarantine policy
dependencies.degradation_mode: Scan timed out or returned unsupported; File is quarantined or unreadable
dependencies.fallback_strategy: FallbackReviewCase with same-lineage degraded receipt; Manual review or re-upload request
dependencies.notes: Private object storage is an internal platform surface; the external dependency here is the scanning service, not the storage bucket.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: booking, waitlist, and provider confirmation truth
monitoring_signals: Current CandidateSnapshot admitted as trusted_offerable by NetworkCoordinationPolicyEvaluation for the same policy tuple and source set.
Manual site list or stale spreadsheet
Partial supplier coverage without trust admission
Partner data-sharing and source-freshness review
dependencies.degradation_mode: degraded_diagnostic_only or quarantined_hidden source posture; Snapshot expiry or stale source version
dependencies.fallback_strategy: callback fallback or return_to_practice; read_only_provenance or callback_only recovery in the same shell
dependencies.notes: Network offers may not become patient-visible or closable while the current feed posture is degraded or quarantined.

dependencies.dependency_name: NHS standards and assurance source set
source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9D. Assurance pack factory and standards evidence pipeline

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: standards posture, governance evidence, and release gating
monitoring_signals: Current StandardsVersionMap and StandardsDependencyWatchlist bound to the same assurance-evidence graph and release candidate under review.
Static checklist copied into local notes
Legacy documentation link still resolves somewhere
Governance sign-off on refreshed standards baselines
dependencies.degradation_mode: Standards version moved, refreshed, or decommissioned; Supplier assurance evidence is stale or suspended
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Freeze affected onboarding or release step until review completes; Open explicit standards exception or evidence gap
dependencies.notes: This row captures source-of-law dependency, not a live API. It is still operationally real because stale standards can block release and onboarding.

source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2B. NHS login bridge and local session engine
blueprint-init.md#10. Identity, consent, security, and policy
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: patient authentication, writable posture, and recovery continuity
monitoring_signals: Current SessionEstablishmentDecision plus current Session, IdentityBinding, and RouteIntentBinding showing writable authority for the same subject and lineage.
NHS login callback arrived
Token exchange completed
Partner approval before non-mock credentials are issued
dependencies.degradation_mode: ConsentNotGiven or access_denied returns; Subject mismatch or stale subject binding version
dependencies.fallback_strategy: bounded_recovery with explicit post-auth next step; auth_read_only or claim_pending shell posture
dependencies.notes: NHS login remains an authentication rail only; it does not replace patient linkage, PDS, or claim ownership.

source_refs: phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#Manage, reminders, and practice visibility after hub booking
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: cross-organisation messaging and hub coordination
monitoring_signals: Current-generation PracticeAcknowledgementRecord matching the live truthTupleHash and ackGeneration for the active hub visibility duty.
Transport accepted or delivered
Origin practice viewed an older message
Policy review for which changes require renewed acknowledgement
dependencies.degradation_mode: Acknowledgement overdue or disputed; Generation drift after cancellation, reschedule, or supplier-drift update
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Operational escalation and overdue timers; Recovery-required practice visibility posture
dependencies.notes: Transport acceptance, delivery evidence, and explicit acknowledgement are distinct facts and must stay distinct in the inventory and UI.

source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6C. Pharmacy discovery, provider choice, and directory abstraction
phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#Pharmacy contract, case model, and state machine
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: pharmacy referral, dispatch proof, and closure posture
monitoring_signals: Current PharmacyDirectorySnapshot and PharmacyChoiceProof over the visible choice set and selected provider explanation.
Cached provider list without current snapshot age
Convenience ranking or open-now signal alone
Directory access-path selection and deprecation watch review
dependencies.degradation_mode: Stale or partial directory snapshot; Unsafe timing or capability drift
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Same-shell directory regeneration; Warned choice or clinician fallback when no safe provider remains
dependencies.notes: Discovery truth must remain separate from later dispatch and outcome truth; no hidden-default provider path is allowed.

dependencies.dependency_name: Pharmacy outcome observation and reconciliation path
source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6F. Outcome ingest, Update Record observation, and reconciliation
forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 79 - weak-source matching did not clearly stop at a case-local review state
phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6G. Bounce-back, urgent return, and reopen mechanics
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: pharmacy referral, dispatch proof, and closure posture
monitoring_signals: Current PharmacyOutcomeRecord or PharmacyBounceBackRecord correlated to the active PharmacyCase and, where needed, resolved through PharmacyOutcomeReconciliationGate.
Update Record transport observed
Email or inbox delivery received
Outcome source acceptance policy review
dependencies.degradation_mode: Weak or conflicting match against the active case; Duplicate or replayed outcome evidence
dependencies.fallback_strategy: outcome_reconciliation_pending with explicit review placeholder; Reopen for safety when the outcome is urgent or materially different
dependencies.notes: Outcome ingest is an observation boundary only; it cannot behave like direct pharmacy-system control or auto-close on weak evidence.

phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#Pharmacy contract, case model, and state machine
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: pharmacy referral, dispatch proof, and closure posture
monitoring_signals: Current DispatchProofEnvelope(authoritative proof satisfied) accepted by the live TransportAssuranceProfile and current ExternalConfirmationGate for the same dispatch attempt.
adapter_dispatched
transport_accepted
Transport-path selection and data-sharing review
dependencies.degradation_mode: proof_pending at or near deadline; contradiction score above threshold
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Keep same-shell pending or reconciliation posture; Controlled redispatch only under a fresh tuple
dependencies.notes: Vecells may dispatch through several transports, but no transport-only evidence may project calm referred truth.

source_refs: phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6D. Referral pack composer, dispatch adapters, and transport contract
phase-6-the-pharmacy-loop.md#6G. Bounce-back, urgent return, and reopen mechanics
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: cross-organisation messaging and hub coordination
monitoring_signals: Current urgent-return or bounce-back evidence acknowledged on the configured route and bound to the active PharmacyCase or reopened request lineage.
Email sent to the safety-net mailbox
Voicemail or phone transfer attempted
Practice-level route ownership sign-off
dependencies.degradation_mode: Urgent return not yet acknowledged on the current route; Stale or misconfigured monitored email or professional number
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Immediate duty-task reopen or supervisor escalation; Phone escalation if mailbox or digital route is unavailable
dependencies.notes: Urgent return is a human-operated safety net and therefore cannot be downgraded into a simulated healthy dependency.

dependencies.dependency_name: Runtime publication and release tuple pipeline

ReleasePublicationParityRecord exists for the candidate
dependencies.degradation_mode: freeze_release_and_keep_last_published_tuple
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Hold promotion and route all operators to the last known-good published tuple.

dependencies.dependency_name: Restore rehearsal and recovery evidence pack

runbook steps match the current region and trust-zone topology
dependencies.degradation_mode: recovery_posture_downgrades_to_review_required
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Hold BAU transfer and widen observation until a fresh rehearsal pack is produced.

dependencies.blast_radius_scope: programme-wide standards posture and release gating
monitoring_signals: Standards watchlist hash remains stable for the current review package
No open promotion-blocking compatibility alerts
dependencies.degradation_mode: promotion_blocked_until_exception_or_baseline_updates_settle
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Keep the current published tuple and require explicit, time-bound exception evidence.
dependencies.notes: Internal dependency row added by seq_018 so standards hygiene cannot stay ownerless.

source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2E. Telephony call-session ingestion, evidence readiness, and convergence
phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2F. Caller verification, voice capture, transcript stub, and SMS continuation
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: telephony ingress, evidence readiness, and callback repair
monitoring_signals: Current CallSession evidence or CallbackOutcomeEvidenceBundle linked to AdapterReceiptCheckpoint and the current lineage-bound callback or intake objects.
Carrier accepted a call leg
Callback queued or dial started
Contract and regulated-recording review before live call handling
dependencies.degradation_mode: recording_missing or transcript_degraded; Duplicate or contradictory callback outcomes
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Callback retry or governed manual escalation; Secure-link continuation where route authority allows
dependencies.notes: Telephony parity is baseline, but carrier acceptance or callback initiation never equals completed clinical contact.

source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2E. Telephony call-session ingestion, evidence readiness, and convergence
phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2F. Caller verification, voice capture, transcript stub, and SMS continuation
forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 12 - No safe fallback when ingest or safety failed
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: telephony ingress, evidence readiness, and callback repair
monitoring_signals: TelephonyTranscriptReadinessRecord with clinically sufficient coverage accepted by TelephonyEvidenceReadinessAssessment(usabilityState = safety_usable).
Transcript job queued or running
Keyword-only or partial utterance output
Clinical-safety review of derived-facts use before any automated promotion depends on the provider
dependencies.degradation_mode: Coverage is partial or clinically insufficient; Contradictory transcript reruns or stale derivation packages
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Manual transcription or audio review; continuation_challenge or manual_only posture
dependencies.notes: Transcript completion is never enough by itself; the readiness assessment is the governing proof.

source_refs: phase-7-inside-the-nhs-app.md#7A. Integration manifest and route inventory
phase-7-inside-the-nhs-app.md#7H. Sandpit, AOS, SCAL, and operational delivery pipeline
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: deferred embedded channel readiness and publication control
monitoring_signals: Current NHSAppIntegrationManifest, PatientEmbeddedNavEligibility, and PatientEmbeddedSessionProjection under the approved manifest, release, and bridge-capability tuple.
User-agent or query hint suggests embedded mode
Raw bridge object is present
NHS App suitability and demo-environment review before Sandpit or AOS access
dependencies.degradation_mode: Manifest drift across Sandpit, AOS, and live; Bridge capability mismatch or stale embedded continuity evidence
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Safe browser handoff; read_only or placeholder-only embedded posture
dependencies.notes: Deferred channel expansion only. The inventory keeps the onboarding and downgrade rules ready without rebasing current scope.

dependencies.dependency_name: Assistive model vendor and subprocessor family
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: partner-facing capability and current-baseline delivery
monitoring_signals: Current AssistiveCapabilityTrustEnvelope plus AssistiveCapabilityRolloutVerdict and supplier-assurance freshness for the exact route, cohort, and watch tuple.
Model returned output successfully
Vendor status page looks healthy
Subprocessor and assurance review before any live visible cohort
dependencies.degradation_mode: trustState = degraded, quarantined, shadow_only, or frozen; Supplier assurance drifted, suspended, or stale
dependencies.fallback_strategy: observe_only, provenance_only, placeholder_only, or hidden posture; Shadow-only or frozen rollout without widening assistive actionability
dependencies.notes: The assistive control plane is in scope, but live model vendors remain optional and must fail to shadow, observe-only, or hidden posture.

source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2C. Patient linkage, demographic confidence, and optional PDS enrichment
blueprint-init.md#10. Identity, consent, security, and policy
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: partner-facing capability and current-baseline delivery
monitoring_signals: A legally permitted PDS lookup correlated to the current linkage candidate set and accepted as supporting evidence by IdentityBindingAuthority.
NHS login contact claim
Single local demographic candidate without sufficient confidence
Legal basis and governance approval before sandbox or live access
dependencies.degradation_mode: Legal basis or onboarding still incomplete; PDS response conflicts with local or telephony evidence
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Local matching only with partial_match or review posture; Support-assisted correction without widening identity truth
dependencies.notes: Optional by corpus law: PDS is an enrichment seam, not a baseline blocker and not a substitute for NHS login or local binding governance.

source_refs: phase-2-identity-and-echoes.md#2F. Caller verification, voice capture, transcript stub, and SMS continuation
dependencies.blast_radius_scope: notification, secure-link, and patient reassurance posture
monitoring_signals: Current AdapterReceiptCheckpoint plus the governing AccessGrant or CommunicationEnvelope still current for the same route and visibility tuple.
Send request accepted by provider
Link issued but not redeemed
Sender registration and regulated messaging review before live traffic
dependencies.degradation_mode: Wrong-recipient or stale-number risk; Bounced, expired, or disputed delivery
dependencies.fallback_strategy: Email or support reissue; Challenge continuation instead of seeded continuation
dependencies.notes: SMS is external only for delivery. Secure-link issuance and AccessGrant semantics remain internal control-plane behavior.
